_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL
name: Golang Custom (Optimized)
author: antigravity@google.com
description: Flexible Golang egg with Auto-Update, Build support, and Multi-file execution.
startup: if [ -d .git ] && [ "${AUTO_UPDATE}" == "1" ]; then git pull; fi; if [ -f go.mod ]; then go mod tidy; fi; if [ "${GO_RUN_MODE}" == "build" ]; then go build -ldflags='-s -w' -o app ${MAIN_FILE} && chmod +x app && ./app; else go run ${MAIN_FILE}; fi

variables.name: Main File(s)
variables.description: Main Go file(s) to run. You can specify multiple files separated by spaces (e.g., 'main.go task.go').

variables.name: Run Mode
variables.description: Choose between 'run' (direct execution) or 'build' (compile then run).

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Pull latest changes from git on startup if .git exists.
